notes: 0.6.0 shipped four verbs: install-hook (pre-push gate), next pre-session gate (refuse on drift, --no-check waiver), status --json (snapshot + embedded verdict, never gates), verify <commit> + state diff (read-only inspection over the git trail). 54 tests green. Core verbs unchanged; new verbs are tooling ergonomics. check-shipped-log deferred to 0.7.0 (verdict-changing protocol slice — design the mapping + backfill rule so it cannot redden pre-adoption repos). Session logs are technical-only by policy (casp-sh CLAUDE.md s3). Run node dist/cli.js check before push.
